CareLink.description: Connect caregivers and patients without the chaos—reminders, health tracking, and peace of mind in one app.
points: Medication adherence tracking with smart reminders
Shared caregiver dashboard for family coordination
AI wellness insights and proactive health alerts

pest-detection.description: Your crops' personal AI doctor—spot diseases before they become disasters.
points: Real-time disease identification from plant photos
Smart treatment recommendations by crop type
Early warning system that prevents crop loss

Portfolio.description: Interactive portfolio that proves code can be beautiful—3D visualizations, live GitHub sync, and pure tech flex.
points: 3D brain visualization of interconnected projects
Real-time GitHub integration (no manual updates)
Interactive skills globe and timeline animations

Dumbathon.description: Where developers build dumb ideas fast and make them legendary—hackathon platform meets game night.
points: Rapid-fire coding challenges with real-time scoring
Team collaboration tools and idea sharing
Fun, low-stakes learning through competition

Hack-Me-If-You-Can.description: Learn hacking by actually hacking—ethical security challenges that level up your defense skills.
points: Progressive difficulty from basic to advanced exploits
Real-world vulnerability scenarios
Instant feedback and achievement unlocks

HabbitTracker.description: Turn consistency into superpowers—track habits, understand patterns, crush goals.
points: Streak logic that forgives slip-ups (not failures)
Behavioral insights powered by habit science
Motivational notifications that actually help

ClickbaitDetection.description: The internet's BS detector—kills clickbait headlines and surfaces real news.
points: NLP-powered manipulation recognition engine
Accuracy that keeps improving with your feedback
Browser integration to save you from trash content

SignGlove.description: Wearable translator that turns hand gestures into spoken words—breaking down communication barriers.
points: Real-time gesture recognition via motion sensors
Multi-language support with ML training
Accessible communication technology

FedSkinLesion.description: Medical AI that learns without stealing your data—privacy-first skin lesion diagnosis.
points: Decentralized learning across hospital networks
HIPAA-compliant patient data protection
High accuracy without centralizing sensitive data

ExpenseTracker.description: Your money's personal accountant—automatic categorization, budgets that make sense.
points: Smart auto-categorization with ML learning
Spending pattern insights and trends
Budget recommendations based on your habits

LSTM.description: Deep learning playground—sequence models, time series forecasting, and NLP experiments.
points: LSTM networks for temporal pattern recognition
Text generation and language modeling
Attention mechanisms and transformer experiments
